Many tall/big pawpaw trees along main river trail about 1 mile in at East Palisades.
Grove of small pawpaws. The tallest one is 4’.
Whitewater Creek Trail, Sandy Springs, GA 30339, USA
Pawpaw patch along the river inlet. Pawpaws hang over the water which makes them tough to get to. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.
